settings.title: Monster Piercing Gold
settings.text:
If you’re as obsessed with real gold as we are, you’re in the right place. Our Gold Collection features stunning 14K, 9K, 10K, and 18K gold body jewellery, all made to last and designed to shine. We started this collection because we wanted beautiful, genuine gold piercings that didn’t cost a fortune (and didn’t compromise on quality).

Every piece in this collection (from gold belly rings and nose hoops to labrets and ear studs) is crafted with care, using real gold and high-quality materials only. We work hard to keep our prices fair while still delivering that luxe, polished finish you deserve.

Whether you’re treating yourself to your first gold piercing or adding to your collection, these pieces are made to be worn every day, comfortable, hypoallergenic, and just the right amount of shine.

Real gold. Honest prices. Beautiful quality.
That’s the MP way. Proudly designed in the UK and shipped worldwide with love (and perfect packaging).

settings.question: What type of gold do you use in your body jewellery?
settings.answer: All our gold jewellery is made from solid 14K gold, never plated or filled. It offers lasting shine, durability, and is safe for sensitive skin. Each piece is designed for long-term wear without fading or tarnishing.

settings.question: Are your gold pieces safe for new piercings?
settings.answer: Yes. Our 14K gold barbells, flatbacks, nose studs, and clickers are made from high-quality solid gold, making them biocompatible and safe for most healed and fresh piercings. Always consult your piercer before inserting new jewellery during healing.

settings.question: Do you offer yellow, white and rose gold options?
settings.answer: Yes. Most of our gold jewellery is available in yellow gold, with selected pieces also available in white or rose gold. Each tone is genuine 14K gold and finished to perfection.

settings.question: Why are your gold prices more affordable than other shops?
settings.answer: We work directly with trusted manufacturers and maintain low mark-ups, allowing us to offer unbeatable prices on genuine 14K gold body jewellery without compromising quality. You’re getting the same premium gold, just without the luxury retail price tag.
